## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Validation

<!-- List the exact commands and manual scenarios you ran. -->

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and contains no personal Instagram data.
- [ ] User-visible behavior and compatibility effects are documented.
- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior or the testing gap is explained.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots when practical.
